name: sinops Inc.
summary: sinops Inc. engages in the development of automatic ordering systems for retail, wholesale, and manufacturing sectors. It offers sinops-R6, a demand forecasting type automatic ordering system; sinops-Pad, a shelf allocation maintenance app; sinops-Plg, a shelf allocation planning system; sinops-MD, an assortment optimization system; sinops-W, a demand forecasting cash flow optimization system; sinops-IM, a transfer instruction optimization system; and sinops-M, a medium- and long - term demand forecasting system. The company also provides logistics diagnosis and improvement, and shelf allocation consultation services. sinops Inc. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
